title: invitations — health probes
description: Health probes registered with Foundation's health aggregator (surfaced via `GET /api/health`). Detects downstream mail-transport availability + inbound webhook liveness.

probes.name: invitations-mail-transport-reachable
probes.description: Pings each configured mail transport's API health endpoint (SendGrid /v3/user/profile, SES ListVerifiedEmailAddresses, Postmark /server, Mailgun /domains). Non-critical because a single transport outage is handled by RetryBounceJob backoff — the platform degrades to a queue, not a fail.

probes.name: invitations-webhook-recent-signal
probes.description: Checks that at least one InvitationEvent from a mail-transport webhook has arrived in the last 6 hours. Zero recent signals with active invitations pending → probable transport-webhook misconfiguration. Non-critical (informational).

probes.name: invitations-queue-depth-not-stalled
probes.description: Reads the depth of `invitations` + `webhooks` queues. Fails when depth > 10000 pending jobs OR oldest job > 15 minutes. Indicates a stuck worker or an abusive burst.

probes.name: invitations-schedule-registered
probes.description: Boot-time. Verifies the four scheduled entries (expire-stale, cleanup-accepted, resend-failed, audit-report) registered on the scheduler. Detects a bad service-provider boot.
